title: Two complementary JSON scanners in secretx-core are justified — not duplicate code
description: secretx-core has a char-level scanner (json_extract_string_field, surrogate pair decoding, returns Zeroizing String) and a byte-level scanner (json_navigate, returns &[u8] sub-slices without allocation). A contributor might suggest merging them. They cannot be merged: char-level Peekable<Chars> does not expose byte offsets; byte-level indexing cannot drive surrogate pair logic without decoding first. The 2026 first-pass review added a maintenance contract comment explaining exactly this. Defend if challenged.
